title: err: sync load stats timeout
description:
## Bug Report

Please answer these questions before submitting your issue. Thanks!

### 1. Minimal reproduce step (Required)

<!-- a step by step guide for reproducing the bug. -->
```
CREATE TABLE t1 (a int, b int, c int);
CREATE TABLE t2 (a int, b int, c int);
CREATE TABLE t3 (a int, b int, c int);
CREATE TABLE t4 (a int, b int, c int);
INSERT INTO t1 VALUES (1,3,0), (2,2,0), (3,2,0);
INSERT INTO t2 VALUES (3,3,0), (4,2,0), (5,3,0);
INSERT INTO t3 VALUES (1,2,0), (2,2,0);
INSERT INTO t4 VALUES (3,2,0), (4,2,0);
CREATE INDEX idx_b ON t2(b);
SELECT t2.a,t2.b,t3.a,t3.b,t4.a,t4.b
  FROM (t3,t4)
       LEFT JOIN
       (t1,t2)
       ON t3.a=1 AND t3.b=t2.b AND t2.b=t4.b order by 1, 2, 3, 4, 5;
```
### 2. What did you expect to see? (Required)
query success

### 3. What did you see instead (Required)
err: Warning 1105: sync load stats timeout

### 4. What is your TiDB version? (Required)

<!-- Paste the output of SELECT tidb_version() -->
 Release Version: v8.4.0-alpha-331-g1455d45729
Edition: Community
Git Commit Hash: 1455d457290f31eb25f5a06a36bfb7c38cb31396
Git Branch: HEAD
UTC Build Time: 2024-10-08 08:06:42
GoVersion: go1.23.0
Race Enabled: false
Check Table Before Drop: false
Store: tikv
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t5 (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), value NUMERIC(10,2));
CREATE TABLE t6 (id INT, description TEXT, amount FLOAT8);
INSERT INTO t5 (name, value) VALUES ('Item A', 10.50), ('Item B', 20.75), ('Item C', 30.00);
INSERT INTO t6 (id, description, amount) VALUES (1, 'Description A', 15.00), (2, 'Description B', 25.50);
SELECT t5.name, t5.value, t6.description, t6.amount FROM t5 LEFT JOIN t6 ON t5.id = t6.id WHERE t5.value > 15.00 ORDER BY t5.id;
key_bug_features: LEFT JOIN with multiple conditions on indexed table
